name: Shrimp Pilau
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the finely chopped celery and bell pepper to the butter. Cook until the vegetables are soft.
3. Season the shrimp with Worcestershire sauce, cayenne pepper, flour, salt, and pepper.
4. Stir the seasoned shrimp into the butter mixture. Cook for about 5 minutes or until the shrimp are cooked through.
5. Combine the cooked shrimp with hot rice and crumbled bacon.
